arts.ttl: Man Utd star Rashford put in his place
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has responded to Marcus Rashford after the Manchester United star lashed out at his critics. Premier League legend Alan Shearer has been one of Man Utd's harshest critics in recent times and he has now responded to the comments attributed to Rashford on The Rest is Football .

arts.ttl: Manchester United signing has gone from outcast to undroppable in just nine games
arts.sum: Man Utd got back to winning ways at the weekend and it was another excellent afternoon for one of their most exciting players.

arts.ttl: It’s significant – Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag stresses importance of Carabao Cup
arts.sum: United host League One Barnsley in the third round of the competition on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sends warning to Antony ahead of Carabao Cup tie against Barnsley amid the £86m Man United star's lack of game time this season after falling down the pecking order
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: The Brazil star has made just one appearance this season as an 89th-minute substitute at Brighton, and will be hoping to get his first start in the third-round tie against Barnsley.

arts.ttl: Every word Erik ten Hag said in Man United press conference as double injury boost confirmed
arts.sum: A full recap of everything Man United manager Erik ten Hag had to say in his pre-Barnsley press conference at Carrington on Monday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sends clear message to Antony as £89m winger faces Man Utd crossroads
arts.sum: Antony will be hoping for a first start this season when Manchester United face Barnsley in the third round of the Carabao Cup on Tuesday evening at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag delivers team news for Man Utd v Barnsley
arts.sum: Tykes boss Darrell Clarke, a boyhood United fan, has revealed he plans to make a couple of changes to his line-up for the 20:00 BST kick-off. BARNSLEY'S TEAM NEWS

arts.ttl: Manchester United get double injury boost ahead of Barnsley tie
arts.sum: Man United start their League Cup campaign against League One Barnsley at Old Trafford on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Man Utd under Ten Hag are the 'worst in Premier League history'
arts.sum: Manchester United's approach to the game under Erik ten Hag is the worst in the club's Premier League history, according to club legend Andy Cole. Man Utd under Ten Hag are the 'worst in Premier League history'

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Barnsley
arts.sum: There's been plenty to criticise Erik ten Hag for since his appointment as Manchester United manager, but his record in domestic cup competitions has been ever so impressive. CB: Harry Maguire - The England international has dropped down the pecking order following United's summer business, but Maguire will be expected to rack up plenty of appearances this season - especially with Ten Hag happy to rotate his centre-backs during games.
